title: Write Email Real Question 1
text: You are a gardener and you want to share your tips on how to grow beautiful flowers. Write an email to your friends, explaining two methods that you use to keep your plants healthy. Your methods must be based on the following two themes: - Soil - Water You should include both themes. Provide supporting steps for your methods.
answer: Dear Jones, I am writing this because I want to share some tips on growing beautiful flowers. Firstly, I would like to inform you that the key to healthy plants is starting with nutrient-rich soil. Furthermore, it is important to note that proper watering is crucial. Last but not least, these methods have significantly enhanced the vibrancy of my garden. Regards, James

title: Write Email Real Question 2
text: You are a marketer for an advertisement agency and you want to promote a new product that just launched a few days ago to your customers. Write an email to your potential buyers, describing the benefits of the product and asking for availability for a quick catch-up to demonstrate the product. Your benefits must involve the following four themes: - Convenience - Quality - Affordability - Satisfaction Provide supporting testimonials for your benefits.
answer: Dear Ms. Jones, I am writing this because we have an exciting new product that just launched a few days ago. My name is James Clark, and I am a marketer at an advertising agency. Firstly, I would like to inform you that our new product offers exceptional convenience with its user-friendly design and features. Furthermore, it is important to note that the product ensures top-notch quality. Last but not least, the affordability of our new product sets it apart in the market. I hope these benefits resonate with you. I look forward to your reply. Regards, James Clark Marketer, The Real Advertising Agency

title: Write Email Real Question 3
text: You are a book reviewer and you want to recommend a novel to your readers. Write an email to your subscribers, summarizing three aspects of the novel that you enjoyed. Your aspects must be based on the following: - Plot - Characters - Setting You should include all three themes. Provide supporting quotes for your aspects.
answer: Dear Subscribers, I am writing this because I found an amazing book that I think you should read. Firstly, I would like to inform you that the story in this book is really interesting. Furthermore, it is important to note that the people in the book are written well. Last but not least, the place where the story happens makes the book even better. I hope you're interested in these things. Let me know what you think! Regards, James Clark

title: Write Email Real Question 4
text: The local sports authority wants to support more participation and diversity in sports among the children in your area. You are a coach at a local sports club and you would like to make suggestions to the local sports authority. Write an email to Mr Brown, a supervisor of the local sports authority, giving three suggestions for ways to make sports more inclusive and enjoyable to the children. Your ideas must come from the following three themes: - A sports carnival - Using local athletes - After-school programs You should include all three themes. Provide supporting ideas for your suggestions.
answer: Dear Ms. Brown, I am writing this because I want to boost the interest and diversity of kids in sports in our area. My name is James Clark, and I am a coach at the local sports club. Firstly, I would like to inform you that organizing a sports carnival can be fun and include everyone. Furthermore, it is important to note that having local athletes as mentors can inspire and motivate kids. Last but not least, after-school programs for different sports can make exercise easy for kids. I hope these ideas help kids in our community love sports. I look forward to your actions. Regards, James Clark

title: Write Email Real Question 5
text: The local tourism authority wants to attract more visitors to your town. You are a resident of the town and you would like to make suggestions to the local tourism authority. Write an email to Ms Green, a director of the local tourism authority, giving three suggestions for ways to make your town more appealing and accessible to tourists. Your ideas must come from the following three themes: - A historical tour - Using local guides - Weekend packages You should include all three themes. Provide supporting ideas for your suggestions.
answer: Dear Ms Green, I am writing this email to provide a few suggestions to make the town more appealing and accessible to tourists. I am Bruce Lee, and a resident of this town. Firstly, I would like to inform you that our city is historically rich, so we can provide a historical tour to visitors. Furthermore, it is important to note that we could provide local guides to tourists. Last but not least, we can also provide weekend packages at cheaper rates. I hope the idea I have shared above will add immense value to attracting more visitors to our town. Regards, Bruce Lee

title: Write Email Real Question 6
text: You are a journalist for a leading newspaper in your city and you want to report on a major event that happened in your city yesterday. Write an email to your editor, summarizing the aspects of the event that you covered. Your aspects must be based on the following themes: - Cause - Effect - Impact - Response - Opinion Provide supporting sources for your aspects.
answer: Dear Ms. Jones, I am writing this because there was a significant event in our city yesterday. Firstly, I would like to inform you that the event was a massive power outage caused by a technical failure at the city's main power station. Furthermore, it is important to note that the outage had widespread effects, disrupting daily life for thousands of residents. Last but not least, the impact of the event highlights the vulnerability of our city's infrastructure. I hope these aspects provide a good overview. I look forward to your guidance on how to proceed. Regards, James Clark Journalist, The Dhaka Post

title: Write Email Real Question 7
text: You are a language school teacher and want to persuade more adults in your area to enroll in your courses. Write an email to the editor of the local newspaper, explaining three reasons why learning a foreign language benefits adults. Your reasons must be based on the following three themes: - Personal development - Career opportunities - Cultural awareness You should include all three themes. Provide supporting examples for your reasons.
answer: Dear Mr Dave, I am writing this email to persuade more adults to learn a foreign language. Firstly, I feel that learning a foreign language will further enhance personal development such as discipline and being a goal-oriented person. Additionally, I also believe that they can get more job opportunities, thus leading to better job prospects and increased earning potential. Finally, embracing a new language promotes cultural awareness, fostering understanding and connections between people from different backgrounds. I hope you will consider sharing these compelling reasons with our community, encouraging more adults to embark on this enriching journey. Warm Regards, Bruce Lee

title: Write Email Real Question 8
text: You are a volunteer at a local animal shelter and you want to invite more adults to adopt a pet. answer: Dear Subscribers, I am writing because we have three adorable animals eager to become part of your family. Firstly, meet Max, an energetic pup with a heart full of love. His playful personality and friendly nature make him a perfect companion for an active household. Also, we have Luna, a sweet cat in excellent health. Luna's shiny coat and regular vet check-ups ensure she'll be a happy addition to any loving home. Finally, consider adopting Oliver, a laid-back rabbit whose calm and easygoing personality makes him an ideal friend for a relaxed environment. I hope you'll open your hearts and homes to these lovable creatures. Warm regards, Bruce Lee Animal Shelter Volunteer

title: Write Email Real Question 16

answer: Dear Sir, I am writing because we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the defective product you received. Firstly, we will process a full refund for your purchase. Your money should be reflected in your account within 5 business days. Also, a replacement item will be dispatched immediately at no extra cost, so you receive a flawless product as soon as possible. Finally, to express our sincere apologies, we'll include a complimentary gift card as compensation for the trouble faced. I hope these steps demonstrate our commitment to making things right. Your satisfaction is our priority. Best regards, Bruce Lee Customer Service Representative

title: Write Email Real Question 17
text: You are a fitness instructor and you want to motivate more adults to exercise regularly. Write an email to your clients, suggesting different types of workouts that they can try. Your workouts must relate to the following classes: - Cardio - Strength - Flexibility - Balanced Provide supporting benefits for your workouts.
answer: Dear clients, I am writing this to motivate more adults to exercise regularly to stay fit and healthy. Firstly, cardio sessions are the most important and basic exercises that everyone must practice. It will help you to boost your immunity and heart functions. Also, most people lose strength after a certain age. Thus lifting weights daily makes you stronger and more energetic. Moreover, yoga or simple stretches improve flexibility, enhance posture, reduce injury risk, and ease muscle tension. Finally, a proper balance is always important in life. Therefore, daily balance workouts improve stability, coordination, and overall well-being. I hope these suggestions will motivate you. Please let me know if you like to discuss them further. Best wishes, Bruce Lee

title: Write Email Real Question 19
text: You are a lawyer and you want to persuade a jury to acquit your client. Write an email to the judge, explaining four pieces of evidence that support your case. Your evidence must be based on the following four themes: - Alibi - Motive - Witness - DNA You should include all four themes. Provide supporting facts for your evidence.
answer: Your Honor, I am writing because it is crucial to shed light on significant evidence that supports my client's innocence. Firstly, my client has a solid alibi, confirmed by multiple reliable sources, placing them far from the scene at the time of the incident. Also, a lack of motive further weakens the prosecution's case, as no logical reason exists for my client's alleged involvement. Moreover, a credible witness has come forward, attesting to my client's innocence and challenging the prosecution's narrative. Finally, DNA analysis on the crime scene provides inconclusive results, raising doubts about my client's involvement. I hope these points prompt a careful consideration of the evidence and a fair assessment of my client's case. Respectfully, Lee
